pageContext.name: The Flash 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Since the Golden Age, THE FLASH™ has been a prominent hero in the DC universe. There have been many renditions of The Fastest Man Alive, arguably, the most popular identities to have graced the mantle are Jay Garrick, Barry Allen, and Wally West — each redefining what it means to be a hero.   The coin include intricate engravings and show THE FLASH posing powerfully. This 1oz silver incorporates him in full speed.  Each coin comes in a high-quality, custom-themed case with a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender. The coin's unique number in its limited mintage is also provided.  Grab your favorite today before it speeds by!
